subject: (no subject)
body:
Hey, the chandalier from PB has vanished - the one you liked and that was valuable - I am so sorry..it is missing along with the lucite desk that used to be in my office. I am very upset as I know that you liked it and wanted it put up, and that you said it was v valuable. I had Doug go through all the storage units today to finally say once and for all that it is gone. Should I claim for it on insurance along with the desk?
I am sorry
body_html:
Hey, the chandalier from PB has vanished - the one you liked and that was valuable - I am so sorry..it is missing along with the lucite desk that used to be in my office. I am very upset as I know that you liked it and wanted it put up, and that you said it was v valuable. I had Doug go through all the storage units today to finally say once and for all that it is gone. Should I claim for it on insurance along with the desk?
I am sorry
